ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "unit_sales" INTEGER /* Total unit sales of the vehicle */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the vehicle was sold */,
  "price" REAL /* Initial selling price of the vehicle */,
  "year_resale_value" REAL /* Estimated resale value after a year */,
  "retention_percent" REAL /* Retention percentage indicating resale likelihood */,
  "retention_value" TEXT /* Retention value in currency */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size in liters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower output of the vehicle */,
  "hp_level" TEXT /* Level of horsepower classification */,
  "wheelbase" REAL /* Wheelbase length in inches */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the vehicle in inches */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vehicle in inches */,
  "curb_weight" REAL /* Curb weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity in gallons */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "latest_launch" TEXT /* Date of the latest launch of the model */,
  "power_perf_factor" REAL /* Power performance factor for the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., Passenger, SUV) */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (unique for each vehicle) */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was produced */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "drive_train" TEXT /* Drive train configuration (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "mpg_city" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in city conditions (miles per gallon) */,
  "mpg_highway" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in highway conditions (miles per gallon) */,
  "emissions_rating" TEXT /* Emissions rating of the vehicle */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the vehicle */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in years */,
  "warranty_mileage" INTEGER /* Warranty mileage limit */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the vehicle (e.g., sunroof, navigation system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_type FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the manufacturer */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold in that sale */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale including tax and discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resale_values" (
  "resale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resale value record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle for which the resale value is tracked */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the resale value is estimated */,
  "estimated_value" REAL /* Estimated resale value for that year */,
  "resale_date" TEXT /* Date when the resale value was estimated */,
  "resale_location" TEXT /* Location where the resale value is estimated */,
  "resale_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle at the time of resale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resale_values_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being measured */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "power_perf_factor" REAL /* Power performance factor of the vehicle */,
  "acceleration_0_to_60" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 mph to 0 in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., Passenger, SUV) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of vehicles in this category */,
  "average_fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Average fuel efficiency of vehicles in this category */,
  "average_horsepower" INTEGER /* Average horsepower of vehicles in this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
